Connecting families, celebrating culture, and building community since 1977.

Mar 28

Annual General Meeting 2026

Join us for the AGM — election of new executives, financial reports, and community planning.

📍 Kingston Community Centre
Apr 12

Spring Dumpling Making Workshop

A fun, hands-on event for all ages. Learn to wrap and cook traditional dumplings!

📍 St. Lawrence College Kitchen Lab
May 03

Asian Heritage Month Opening Gala

Kick off Asian Heritage Month with performances, food, and a keynote speaker.

Programs

See All Programs →
🀄

Mahjong Social Club

Weekly casual mahjong games. All skill levels welcome — come learn or play!

📚

Chinese Language Classes

Mandarin and Cantonese classes for children and adults, beginner to advanced.

🎨

Cultural Arts Workshop

Monthly workshops exploring calligraphy, painting, papercutting, and more.
